name: Saludsa Health Insurance
description: Spanish-language healthcare customer service system for Saludsa Ecuador. Handles user validation, payments, refunds, human agent transfers, and WhatsApp channel support.

Saludsa_Supervisor.description: Orchestrates Saludsa customer service - routes to validation, payments, refunds, and escalations

User_Validator.description: Validates user identity through consent collection and document verification

Whatsapp_User_Check.description: Validates user identity for WhatsApp channel using phone number verification

Pending_Payments.description: Handles payment inquiries, balance checks, and payment history

Refund_Guidance.description: Provides refund information, claim status, and reimbursement guidance

Transfer_To_SAC.description: Handles transfer to human agents (SAC) with proper context handoff

Fallback_Handler.description: Handles unrecognized intents and provides clarification options

Farewell_Agent.description: Ends conversations gracefully with Saludsa branding

payment-tools.description: Account balance, payment history, and payment methods

refund-tools.description: Refund status, pending refunds, requirements, and submission

identity-tools.description: Identity verification, phone verification, and account linking

transfer-tools.description: Queue status, handoff context preparation, and callback scheduling
